title: IARC Annual Report
summary: This is the web version of the International Arctic Research Center 2021 annual report. The full publication, along with past years’ reports , can be downloaded from the IARC Communication Products page. Download a PDF of the 2021 IARC annual report Message from the Director 2021 has further strengthened IARC’s role as a leader in Arctic collaboration — a key aspect of the strategic planning initiative we worked on this past year. IARC’s new Massive Open Online Course illustrates the many facets of our researchers’ expertise and engagement. Under leadership of John Walsh, Rick Thoman and Mike DeLue, more than 20 IARC scientists, and another dozen outside collaborators, created Climate Change in Arctic Environments (p. 15). Since the launch in late 2021, nearly 1,000 people registered to take the MOOC, and I invite you to explore the resource as well. title: Nineteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 23, 2022
summary: On March 23, YKHC reports nineteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Student Highlight: Amber Ongtowasruk
summary: “Now I for sure want to further my education in accounting at one of the University of Alaska campuses and earn a bachelor’s degree.” We don’t always know what we want to do in life. Sometimes figuring that out means getting our feet wet by trying something new. That’s exactly what Kawerak Vocational Training Scholar and AVTEC graduate Amber...

title: A Treasure Island in the Bering Strait
summary: Sledge Island, a rocky outcrop in the Bering Strait 24 miles from Nome, is host to artifacts, wildlife, and survival stories. The post A Treasure Island in the Bering Strait appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: The 49th Star!
summary: It's been 15 years since the release of Alaska Mando and our Random Retro Record Roulette Wheel uncovers something even more remarkable.
